ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the stock_exchanges table */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the stock's information */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the stocks table (if applicable) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument (e.g., U.S. Treasury for bonds) */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the instrument (for bonds) */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate of the instrument (for bonds) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Issue date of the instrument */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the instrument's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, Dow Jones) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "constituent_stocks" TEXT /* List of constituent stocks (as JSON or a separate table with a many-to-many relationship) */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index value */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the index's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_stock_prices, manage_stock_exchanges) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news feed */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news feed */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news feed */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news feed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news feed was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news feed (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news feed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news feed (e.g., earnings, product launch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news feed analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news feed (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES news_feeds ("feed_id")
)
